summary: Closed the delivered-role quota-center residual by routing the visible menu through a server-action entry that returns the existing client-action dict. PM, finance, executive, and business_admin can now execute the quota-center entry without ir.actions.client access errors.

notes: The fix changes only the menu entry path.
The original ir.actions.client record is still not directly readable by several delivered roles, which confirms the fix stayed scoped to entry-path behavior.

next_step: Open a narrow reclassification batch to re-audit the dictionary/quota family on the cleaned runtime.
